It belongs to the genus Oxymeris, a group of trees that are native to tropical regions. The species is further classified as a flowering plant, specifically a tree, due to its growth habit and characteristics. Oxymeris dolichostachya is also known to be a part of the subfamily Mimoideae, which comprises various tropical trees.
